source_name: DCCEEW National Greenhouse Gas Inventory - total emissions

fields.scope: Total Australian net greenhouse gas emissions, Mt CO2-equivalent, financial year. Includes LULUCF (land-use, land-use change and forestry).
fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW Quarterly Update of Australia's National Greenhouse Gas Inventory; National Inventory Report (annual).
fields.keying_plan: Key the most recent quarterly total. Headline comparisons: 2005 baseline (Paris), 2030 target (43% below 2005), 2050 net zero. Cite report edition explicitly.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed total emissions Mt CO2-e. Australia's 2030 target is 43% below 2005 levels (~440 Mt CO2-e); 2005 was ~622 Mt CO2-e. The DCCEEW Quarterly Update is the canonical near-real-time figure; the National Inventory Report (annual) is the UNFCCC submission.
citation: DCCEEW, Quarterly Update of Australia's National Greenhouse Gas Inventory; National Inventory Report.
